name: DLQ_Failed_Transaction
doc: Dead Letter Queue record for transactions that could not be processed after all retries.

fields.name: tx_hash
fields.doc: Ethereum transaction hash that failed processing.

fields.name: reason
fields.doc: Failure reason code: api_exhausted | api_error | unknown.

fields.name: timestamp_ms
fields.doc: Unix epoch milliseconds when the failure was recorded.
